_comment: Active engagement with the Haven-style key-entry form. No PDF yet (document pending) — the gated page shows a 'being finalized' summary and no download button (DownloadSection is gated on pdfFilename). passwordHash gates an empty placeholder page; ROTATE it (scripts/hash-password.mjs) when the real proposal document is added, and deliver the fresh code to the client securely. Add pdfFilename + full sections then.

summary.headline: Your proposal is being finalized.
summary.body: Thanks for your interest in working with ZNAS. The full proposal for this engagement is being prepared and will be available here shortly. You'll be notified as soon as it's ready to review.

summary.headline: Tu propuesta se está finalizando.
summary.body: Gracias por tu interés en trabajar con ZNAS. La propuesta completa para este proyecto se está preparando y estará disponible aquí en breve. Te avisaremos en cuanto esté lista para revisar.
